prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GC6ITNK-STD-GRN Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Serrated Fixed Blade Outdoor Camping Wearable Neck Knife With Sheath, 6", Camo Description: This 6 inch neck knife is the perfect tool for anyone who needs convenient yet durable cutting ability.

With a serrated fixed style blade, the knife is not only discrete and easy to carry at all times, it is effective in multiple ways; with a dull back, you can have precise and firm cutting or stabbing, and you can have it wherever you go. The blade itself is 3.5" in length, and the overall length is 6" including the handle.

The knife comes with a necklace style thick plastic sheath that offers protection and convenience with a lock in place pin to hold the knife handle down steadily. Search Terms: small fixed blade survival knife for hunting outdoor knife with sheath Features: - SURVIVAL KNIFE: Total Length: 6 inches, Blade Length: 3.5 inches - Tanto Style Fixed Blade - Durable Plastic Sheath with Bead Chain Necklace - DIMENSIONS 6 x 2 x 1 inches - Color: Green Camo === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 6" Green Camo Serrated Fixed Blade Neck Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 6-in Green Fixed Blade Neck Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 35 Inch Tanto Blade, Durable Plastic Sheath With Bead Chain, Fixed Blade Survival Knife, Outdoor Hunting Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Serrated Tanto Blade, 35" Cutting Edge, Wearable Bead Chain Sheath, Lock Pin Retention, Compact Survival Tool
